name: Source fidelity review for revised partial reprogramming bundle
summary: The revised text accurately states the absence of direct human intervention evidence and keeps the mechanistic claims bounded.

findings.claim_or_issue: The public note remains interpretive because the track has no direct human intervention efficacy record.
findings.why_it_matters: This keeps readers from confusing mechanistic promise with demonstrated translation.
findings.recommended_action: Retain explicit wording that the change is interpretive discipline rather than a signal upgrade.
